import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FiArrowLeft, FiActivity, FiTarget, FiZap, FiCheckCircle, FiTrendingUp, FiMessageSquare, FiBell, FiShield, FiClock, FiMap, FiBarChart2, FiAward, FiInfo } from 'react-icons/fi'; const SkillDetails: React.FC = () => { const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('decay'); // Features list const features = [ { id: 'decay', label: 'Skill Decay Tracker', icon: }, { id: 'roadmap', label: 'Future Role & Roadmap', icon: }, { id: 'gap', label: 'Skill Gap Forecast', icon: }, { id: 'recommend', label: 'Priority Recommendations', icon: }, { id: 'roi', label: 'Learning ROI', icon: }, { id: 'mentor', label: 'AI Mentor', icon: }, { id: 'alerts', label: 'Trend Alerts', icon: }, { id: 'resilience', label: 'Resilience Score', icon: }, ]; const renderContent = () => { switch (activeTab) { case 'decay': return (

Skill Decay Analysis

Visualizing the shelf-life of your current skill set in the evolving AI landscape.

Current Relevance 85%
1.8 Years
Estimated Half-life
High
Update Frequency
-12% / Year
Decay Rate

Action Recommended

Your knowledge of "Transformer Architectures" needs an update within 4 months to maintain market edge.

); case 'roadmap': return (

Future Role Prediction

92%
Match

Chief AI Architect

Predicted Timeline: 24 - 36 Months

Phase 1: Advanced Scalability

Master Kubernetes and distributed AI training systems.

Phase 2: Strategic AI Governance

Focus on ethical AI frameworks and regulatory compliance.

Final: Enterprise Leadership

Executive communication and high-level strategy.

); case 'gap': return (

Skill Gap Forecast

{[ { name: 'LLM Fine-tuning', gap: 65, status: 'Critical' }, { name: 'Vector Databases', gap: 40, status: 'Moderate' }, { name: 'MLOps Automation', gap: 15, status: 'Low' }, ].map((item, i) => (
{item.name} {item.status}
))}
); case 'recommend': return (

Priority 1: Instant ROI

PyTorch Forecasting
Required for 80% of top-tier jobs.

Priority 2: Resilience

Cross-Platform MLOps
Protects against tech-stack shifts.
); case 'roi': return (

Learning ROI Estimation

+$24,500
Potential Salary Increase
4.2 Months
Payback Period

Market Valuation

Combining your existing Full Stack base with MLOps expertise increases your eligibility for "Lead Architect" positions by 3.5x.

); case 'mentor': return (
AI
Skill Mentor Pro
Online
Hello! I've analyzed your skill profile. Based on current trends, should we focus on optimizing your Vector DB knowledge or RAG pipeline implementation today?
Let's go with RAG pipelines. How does it fit into the scalability Roadmap?
); case 'alerts': return (

Industry Trends & Alerts

{[ { title: "New EU AI Act Update", time: "2h ago", type: "Urgent", desc: "Compliance requirements for LLM deployment have been updated." }, { title: "Nvidia Blackwell Announcement", time: "1d ago", type: "Hardware", desc: "New architecture significantly reduces inference costs for your models." }, { title: "Skill Trend: Agentic Workflows", time: "3d ago", type: "Rising", desc: "Demand for engineers who can build autonomous agents is up 45%." }, ].map((alert, i) => (
{alert.title} {alert.time}

{alert.desc}

))}
); case 'resilience': return (

Skill Portfolio Resilience Score

74%

Your portfolio is Strongly Resilient. You are better protected against AI automation than 78% of your peers in the same industry.

Strongest Factor
Interdisciplinary Design
Risk Factor
Legacy DB Knowledge
); default: return null; } }; return (
{/* Top Nav / Toolbar */}
{features.map((feature) => ( ))}
{/* Header with Skill Name */}
Detailed Analysis

Skill Analytics: {id?.replace(/-/g, ' ')}

Deep dive into your career trajectory, market value, and AI-driven growth path.

{/* Main Content Area */}
{/* Active Feature Content */}
{renderContent()}
{/* Side Overview / Quick Context */}

Quick Stats

Market Demand Rising (+12%)
Job Openings 14.2k
Learning Complexity

Power Move

Based on your profile, learning PyTorch will unlock 85% of high-paying AI Engineer roles.

); }; export default SkillDetails;
